Off Calendar Oct-08-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved/fee paid. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoenas - Production Of Employment Records, Or, In The Alternative, For A Protective Order
Off Calendar Sep-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Raquel Fox, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Amparo Maya
Yan Y. Kam, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Kam Y. Yan

Hearing held and ruling as follows.
Plaintiff's Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoenas-Production Of Business Records is granted, based on plaintiff's supplemental discovery response.
The motion is granted without prejudice to a motion in limine at trial. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoenas - Production Of Business Records, Or, In The Alternative, For A Protective Order
Off Calendar Aug-27-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Raquel Fox, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Amparo Maya
L. Leianne Choy, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Yan Y. Kam

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted.
Plaintiff Amparo Maya's Motion to quash deposition subpoenas-production of business records, on in the alternative, for protective order:
a. Motion to quash deposition subpoenas denied;
b. Motion for protective order granted;
c. Production of medical records pursuant to the subpoenas shall be limited to the period commencing January 1, 2004;
d. With reference to any and all responsive information and documents produced pursuant to the subpoenas, the disclosure of the information shall be limited to the parties, their counsel, any employee of the parties or their counsel (as required by this litigation), and/or expert consulted or retained by counsel in connection with the subject claim. In the event that information is disclosed to any such employee, expert or consultant, those parties shall be informed of these restrictions, and provided with a copy of this order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoenas - Production Of Employment Records, Or, In The Alternative, For A Protective Order
Off Calendar Aug-27-2009 Continued To Sep-24-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Raquel Fox, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Amparo Maya
L. Leianne Choy, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Yan Y. Kam

Hearing held, Plaintiff Amparo Maya's Motion to quash deposition subpoenas-production of employment records, ruling as follows:
- Deposition subpoena stayed. Plaintiff shall serve verified supplemental responses to any previous discovery request pertaining to past or present work loss, or time off work.
- Hearing continued to 9/24/09 at 10:30 a.m.in Dept. 610, for further hearing, if required. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2009 Set For Trial On Nov-16-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Oct-29-09 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 501
